{{Quote|The Empire is the natural evolution of human culture. The 'feel-good, we're-just-one-big-happy-family' philosophy of the Old Republic led to corruption and rot. It all sounds so loving and wonderful in Rebel propaganda broadcasts, but educated people know it doesn't work.|Alendar Jarvis, ''Thoughts on Rebellion''|<ref name="Heroes">''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''</ref>}}
'''Alendar Jarvis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] who worked for the ''[[New Order Progressive]]''. Jarvis wrote a fake news report about [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Death/Legends|death]] in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] crash.

==Biography==
Alendar Jarvis was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] who worked for the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ''[[New Order Progressive]]'' [[NewsNet]].<ref name="GNN3" /> He truly believed in the values of the Empire, and felt that chaos and weakness would lead [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to ruin and destined to repeat the mistakes made by the corrupt leaders of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Heroes" /> He saw the Empire as the perfect government, and that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] was a dangerous entity that threatened to destroy the stability of the Empire and restore the corruption of the Republic.<ref name="CSWE" /> Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Jarvis wrote a NewsNet story announcing that [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and his staff [[Death/Legends|died]] in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] crash at the [[Tallaani Shipyards|Tallaan Imperial Shipyards]] to cover up the existence and subsequent destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="GNN3" /> [[1 ABY/Legends|A year later]], Jarvis wrote an article detailing [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]]'s rise through the [[Imperial Court/Legends|Imperial Court]] and the various [[Politics/Legends|political dealings]] between the factions.<ref name="GNN8">{{JournalCite|8|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>
